title: feat: add db driver final approval gate
goal: Add a DB driver final approval gate for v1.1.7 preparation that aggregates owner approval, readiness report, preflight policy, approval dry-run, and review evidence into committed blocked evidence without selecting a DB driver, adding a DB driver dependency, changing package.json or pnpm-lock, connecting to a real DB, executing migrations, running live DB integration tests, applying provider SDK actions, or claiming runtime/production/legal/YouTube policy readiness.
reviewIndependence: Writer evidence and AI review recommendation remain separate.
AI review is not human approval.
Human project-owner confirmation is required before DB driver selection or dependency introduction.
This PR keeps driver choice status not_selected.
forbiddenScope: selected DB driver in committed evidence
approved final gate in committed evidence
doneCriteria: DB driver final approval gate record exists
selected driver remains null in committed evidence
owner approval remains not_approved in committed evidence
readiness and dry-run remain not_ready in committed evidence
all final permission flags remain false in committed evidence
future complete approval is test-only and not committed
solvabilityConstraints: No DB driver dependency may be added.
No package.json or pnpm-lock change may be introduced.
No real DB connection, migration apply, live DB integration test, provider SDK apply, production deployment, or readiness claim may be introduced.
Committed machine evidence must remain blocked and unapproved.
Future approved fixture must remain test-only.
storageOracle: Committed final approval evidence remains blocked, selected_driver null, owner approval not_approved, all final permission flags false.
releaseGateOracle: GitHub typescript/contracts/quality-gate required checks on the current PR head plus evidence:ci and quality:self-protection.
